raw_response: Given your preference for Anker and moderate quality sensitivity, the Anker Prime 100W charger is an excellent choice for your office desk setup. Its high wattage supports simultaneous charging of a laptop and phone, making it highly efficient. Despite being slightly heavier and more expensive than alternatives, its compact form factor and superior build quality justify the premium price. The GaN technology ensures fast, reliable performance, ideal for power-hungry devices.
